The C wrapper implementation contains a heap out-of-bounds read vulnerability due to incorrect assumptions about string termination in the GSSAPI standard. Since GSSAPI buffers are not guaranteed to be null-terminated or have extra padding, this results in reading one byte past the allocated heap buffer.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00223, "percentile": 0.12687}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cp6g-7hqx-qxhp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T13:02:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cp6g-7hqx-qxhp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cp6g-7hqx-qxhp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-2303"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-02-10T20:17:00Z", "published_at": "2026-02-10T21:31:31Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2303", "https://jira.mongodb.org/browse/GODRIVER-3770", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cp6g-7hqx-qxhp"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-go-driver", "summary": "mongo-go-driver has Heap Out-of-Bounds Read in GSSAPI Error Handling", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T13:02:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cp6g-7hqx-qxhp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.17.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.17.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: mongo-go-driver has Heap Out-of-Bounds Read in GSSAPI Error Handling
